title: Edwards Lifesciences: Catalysts For 2023 And Beyond
text: Down 40%+ this year, EW is now trading at levels not seen in years. I believe the sell-off is unjust, and investors over the next few months will benefit immensely.

title: Tesla is not alone: 18 (and a half) other big stocks are headed for their worst year on record
text: In the worst year for stocks since the Great Recession, several big names are headed for their worst year on record with just one trading day left in 2022.

title: Unreliable Contrarianism
text: It appears to us at Smead Capital Management that investors are behaving in a way that will damage their capital and cause them to suffer stock market failure. In 2022, as the favorite tech stocks of the last ten years got trounced, individual investors poured $100 billion into mutual funds and ETFs dominated by ownership of the very stocks which have created the most damage to their results.

title: Jim Cramer recommends these 5 healthcare stocks in 2023
text: Cramer said that healthcare stocks have stayed relatively steady this year because they tend to be recession-resistant stocks.

title: EDWARDS LIFESCIENCES OUTLINES GROWTH STRATEGY AT ANNUAL INVESTOR CONFERENCE
text: IRVINE, Calif. , Dec. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Edwards Lifesciences Corporation (NYSE: EW) will discuss the company's strategy for longer-term growth, provide an update on its technology pipeline and share its financial guidance1 today during its annual investor conference.
